intro: A bipartisan House bill would grant the US government authority to shut down or throttle AI models deemed risky, following security concerns around OpenAI. AMD is challenging Nvidia's AI chip dominance with its new Helios architecture, Instinct GPUs, and EPYC processors, backed by major customer commitments. Anthropic expanded Claude's voice capabilities to handle scheduling and email drafting, while OpenAI made ChatGPT Health available to all US users with Apple Health integration.

whitelist.title: AI Policy - Engadget
whitelist.desc: Breaking news from the worlds of technology and entertainment, and expert reviews of the latest consumer tech products.

whitelist.title: AMD's Rack-Scale Challenge To Nvidia's AI Dominance
whitelist.desc: AMD challenges Nvidia’s AI dominance with Helios, new Instinct GPUs, EPYC processors, ROCm.ai software, and major customer deployment plans.

whitelist.title: AI 'kill switch' bill unveiled as OpenAI hack raises alarms
whitelist.desc: A bipartisan House bill slated to be introduced Thursday would authorize the US government to shut down or throttle risky AI models.

whitelist.title: The Great Coding Reset: How AI is redefining the software engineering industry
whitelist.desc: A multi-part series exploring how AI has sparked an existential transformation in software engineering. In it, we examine AI’s emotional impact on workers, the new token economy, and companies’ attempts to unlock the technology’s full productivity potential.

whitelist.title: Eye on AI

Sign up here.

whitelist.title: Reinventing Experience Management For AI
whitelist.desc: Modern enterprises are demanding a new era of experience management, shifting from mere data reporting to platforms that actively shape the future. The focus is now on AI-driven capabilities that resolve customer and employee issues in real-time and automate actions across the organization. This transformation is fueled by three key forces: always-on listening, AI that acts rather than just reports, and agentic automation, where AI agents autonomously resolve problems.
